summary: Tested Post Delete, I Was There (collaboration request), Post Settings toggles, and NOAA conditions display. All 12 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified: Delete shows confirmation modal, I Was There sends request with success toast, Hide like count/Turn off commenting toggles work, Session log headers display with NOAA conditions (wave, wind, tide indicators present).

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed (same as iteration 197)

seed_data_creation: Test posts created and cleaned up during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All reported bugs are now fixed: 1) Post Delete works - cascade delete configured correctly, confirmation modal shows 'Delete Post?' with warning. 2) I Was There works - correct API path /api/posts/{id}/request-collaboration, shows 'Request sent! The post owner will review your request.' toast and 'Request Pending' badge. 3) NOAA data displays on posts that have it - wave/wind/tide indicators visible in session log headers.

features_verified.post_delete_menu_item: PASS - Delete menu item shows in red for own posts
features_verified.post_delete_confirmation_modal: PASS - Shows 'Delete Post?' title with warning 'This action cannot be undone. The post will be permanently deleted.' and Cancel/Delete buttons
features_verified.post_delete_api: PASS - DELETE /api/posts/{id} returns success, post removed from feed
features_verified.i_was_there_session_header_button: PASS - 'I Was There' button visible in SessionLogHeader for other users' posts
features_verified.i_was_there_click_sends_request: PASS - Clicking button shows toast 'Request sent! The post owner will review your request.'
features_verified.i_was_there_pending_badge: PASS - After request, shows 'Request Pending' badge in yellow
features_verified.i_was_there_self_post_blocked: PASS - Returns 400 'Cannot request collaboration on your own post'
features_verified.post_menu_i_was_there_too: PASS - 'I was there too' option visible in three-dot menu for other users' posts
features_verified.hide_like_count_toggle: PASS - Toggle works, shows 'Like count hidden' toast
features_verified.show_like_count_toggle: PASS - Toggle back works, shows 'Like count shown' toast
features_verified.turn_on_commenting_toggle: PASS - Toggle back works via API
features_verified.session_log_headers: PASS - 16 session log headers found in feed
features_verified.noaa_wave_indicators: PASS - Wave height (ft) indicators present in page
features_verified.noaa_wind_indicators: PASS - Wind speed (mph) indicators present in page
features_verified.noaa_tide_indicators: PASS - Tide status (Falling/Rising) indicators present in page
features_verified.post_with_noaa_data_creation: PASS - Can create posts with wave_height_ft, wave_direction, wind_speed_mph, tide_status, etc.

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/posts (create): PASS - Creates post with session metadata
api_endpoints_tested.DELETE /api/posts/{id}: PASS - Deletes post, returns {success: true, message: 'Post deleted'}
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/posts (feed): PASS - Returns posts with session metadata

console_errors_noted: Failed to fetch bookings: AxiosError - 404 (not related to tested features)

bugs_fixed_verification.post_delete_cascade: VERIFIED - SQLAlchemy cascade='all, delete-orphan' working correctly
bugs_fixed_verification.i_was_there_api_path: VERIFIED - Frontend now calls correct path /api/posts/{id}/request-collaboration
bugs_fixed_verification.noaa_data_display: VERIFIED - Posts with NOAA data show wave/wind/tide in SessionLogHeader
